privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real clinical data from VitalDB Case #6 ('case0006.vital'). The task.json file is syntactically invalid and truncated, completely missing its metadata section, so no metadata claims exist to audit. Independent verification via the vitaldb Python package confirms that during the maintenance phase (excluding the first and last 15 minutes), the global maximum sustained Heart Rate (Solar8000/HR) reaches 111.0 bpm. At the precise time of this peak (approximately 2392 to 2402 seconds), the concurrent Bispectral Index (BIS/BIS) value is consistently between 36.9 and 45.4. Because this BIS value is less than 60, the correct anesthetic adequacy assessment is strictly 'ADEQUATE'.
